title: S.0. 769(E). amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-IL, Section (3), Sub-section (ii) vide number S.0. 814(E), dated the 23 March, 2015,

At sl swET, e o wgEer e = e [, . 15014/21/2009-rfre=ery] T TET AT, H AT Fromor : w77 srfAregeT, Al HEA e 814(w) FTE 23 AT, 2015 FTIT WA ST H TR f < ot < g Hwe Fne, 1250(x) A 11 7, 2015 51T Tt deta B w o MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th March, 2017 $.0. 769(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 and sub-section (6) of section 5 of the Water (Prevention and Control of the Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-IL, Section (3), Sub-section (ii) vide number S.0. 814(E), dated the 23 March, 2015, namely:- In the said notification,- @] for serial number 1 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and the entries shall be substituted, namely:- “1 ‘ Shri S.P.S. Parihar, Chairman, Central Pollution Control Board Chairman™; (i) for serial number 3 to serial number 8 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and the entries shall be substituted, namely:- “3 [ Shri Aniruddha Kumar, Joint Secretary (Thermal), Ministry of Power, | Member New Delhi 4 Shri UP. Singh, Additional Secretary, Ministry of Water Resources, | Member River Development and Ganga Rejuvenation, New Delhi 5 Shri P.K. Dash, Additional Secretary and Financial Adviser, Ministry of | Member Environment Forest and Climate Change, New Delhi or his nominee. 6 Dr. Manoranjan Hota, Adviser, CP Division, Ministry of Environment | Member Forest and Climate Change, New Delhi 7 Shri Sanjeev Saran, Chairman, Uttar Pradesh Pollution Control Board | Member 8 Shri Sri Lakshman, Chairman, Kamataka State Pollution Control Board | Member™; -- 2 of 3 -- [ I-TE 3(ii)] SR 1 TSI 2 SFEIE 3 (iii) for serial number 10 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and the entries shall be substituted, namely: “10 | Shri Arvind Agarwal, Chairman, Gujarat Pollution Control Board [ Member” | [E. No. 15014/21/2009-CPW] ARUN KUMAR MEHTA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, vide notification number S.0. 814(E), dated the 23" March, 2015 and subsequently amended by notification number S.0. 1250(E) dated the 11 May, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
